ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "number_of_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients included in the study */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., Prospective, Retrospective) */,
  "patient_inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for patient inclusion in the study */,
  "testing_strategy" TEXT /* Testing strategy used in the study */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study results */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study concluded */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient (e.g., Endometrial Cancer, Colorectal Cancer) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of cancer (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer (e.g., EC, CRC) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Detailed medical history of the patient */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of patient's consent (e.g., given, not given) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the test was performed on */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic test (e.g., IHC, MSI, BRAF mutation, MLH1 methylation) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the genetic test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the test */,
  "test_methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used for the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of clinical outcome (e.g., LS positive, LS negative) */,
  "outcome_result" TEXT /* Result of the clinical outcome (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clinical outcome */,
  "outcome_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the outcome */,
  "outcome_follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions or recommendations based on the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost analysis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the analysis is part of */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic test (e.g., IHC, MSI, BRAF mutation, MLH1 methylation) */,
  "cost_per_test" REAL /* Cost per test */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the testing strategy */,
  "cost_effectiveness" TEXT /* Cost-effectiveness of the testing strategy (e.g., cost per additional mutation detected) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the analysis */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the cost analysis */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the testing strategy */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the testing strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_analysis_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Detailed information about the data accessed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken during the access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., protocol, report, consent form) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "document_category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., protocol, report, consent form) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who uploaded the document */,
  "document_size" TEXT /* Size of the document file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_documents_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
